text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Summer camp starts today—a time for students to
come together and hone their running.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Dober is all fired up for the Shuka Sho,
and I'm hoping she can further improve her skills
at camp!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I get the feeling we're going to be doing a lot of
sweating this summer.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Indeed, I heard the temperatures are going to be
even higher than last year.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Oh, well, there's that, but... that's not what I
meant.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
There you go again, Bright... Well, let's make this
a good summer.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Ugh, you know I was talking about training!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: I'm here to prepare for the Kikuka Sho.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: And I for the Shuka Sho.

text_block_list.name: Dober and Bright
text_block_list.text:
Let's do this!
We can do this!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Summer camp with Mejiro Dober is off to a
sweltering start!
